📋 All Active Tours

💡 Fill in the route and dates once, then open Trip.com, Google Flights, Skyscanner and Traveloka together in one click — no need to re-type on each site. Supports round-trip, one-way and multi-city. Type a city / airport name (e.g. Tokyo, Bali, 雅加达) and pick from the suggestions, or enter the 3-letter IATA code directly.
🕘 Recent clear

✈️ Flight Search

Enter the route once → auto-price ±N days (Smart Compare) and/or open the comparison sites.
⚠ Retail single-pax estimates from Google Flights — a decision baseline for the cheapest date, not the final team fare. Confirm & book via the links in each row.
🔎 One-way / Multi-city search (open OTA sites manually)

Departure Confirm · Smart Travel Card Onboarding
Opens the Smart Travel Card onboarding tool — enter the Tour Code, upload the departure-confirmation / itinerary + name-list file, review, and submit to create the tour, guide PIN and card pool.
↗ Opens in a new tab; sign in with the Travel Card admin token on first use.

🎯 Outcome Report

Leo-only daily report: what each person completed, what changed, and who only looked busy.

This page reports outcomes, not clicks. A user is “really using” only when work changes state: risk closed, payment advanced, docs completed, PDF generated, ticket/visa/manifest status resolved. Date:

👤 Per-person outcomes

⚠ Fake-use risk

📌 Unfinished / stuck

💡 上传地接行程（支持 .docx / .pdf / .txt）或者直接粘贴文字。系统先生成可编辑 Word + 在线链接；勾选客户 PDF 时，会继续调用 itinerary MCP 生成 WEBUY 品牌中英 PDF。

📝 Quote Generator

PDF 会自动使用中英双语内容；图片由 MCP 快速抓取，生成时间更长。
推荐流程：先生成一次让系统识别景点 → 用给出的图片搜索入口去小红书/谷歌挑图 → 把精选图加到「补充图片」重新 Generate 出 Word；需要直接发客户时勾选「客户PDF」。

🧭 ID-only Data Contract

This is the gate before Product, Marketing, and CRM modules.
AreaAllowed Data Platform ObjectsMandatory Filter / RuleUsed For
Salessemantic.order_sales_viewlegal_entity='wbt_id'orders, revenue, departure, tour code, status
Customerssemantic.id_customer_360_view, semantic.customer_identity_mapID customer scope only; identity map needs confidence notename, phone, email, canonical customer profile
Respondcurated.respondio_id_webuytravel_contact_history_conversations, semantic.respondio_contact_attribution_factregion='id' / account='id_webuytravel'conversation demand, source channel, AI tags
Conversionsemantic.contact_order_linkrespondio_account='id_webuytravel', prefer match_confidence >= 0.95lead-to-order, product conversion, ROI quality
Adssemantic.lead_funnel_meta_spend, semantic.ad_roi_business_view, semantic.product_ad_performanceregion='id'; Google account 2245831515spend, leads, CPL, budget recommendation
Marketmarketbear.industry_stats, vector_index.business_memoryexternal benchmark only; cite source_url when numericcompetitor price, market heat, seasonality

🧱 Build Order

StepWhat Gets BuiltWhy FirstOutput
1ID Product MapAd product_tag, Skybear tour_code, and Respond wording do not naturally match.One product identity used by all modules
2ID Customer MapCRM, product demand, and marketing quality all depend on identity matching.Customer profile + source IDs + confidence
3Product IntelligenceFind demand gaps, product fixes, and benchmark gaps before budget decisions.Scale / fix / reduce / missing product list
4Marketing MonitorBudget logic needs sales, conversation, and product competitiveness.Scale, optimize, test, or cut budget
5CRM AutomationPush messages only after profile, permission, and template logging are stable.Prepared message + send log
Product recommendation logic: sales truth + Respond demand + benchmark + seasonality.

📦 Product Intelligence Logic

Avoid shallow reasons; every recommendation needs evidence from at least two data families.
LayerQuestionData CallDecision Output
Sales TruthWhich ID products actually close?order_sales_view where legal_entity=wbt_idorder rank, revenue IDR, status mix, booking season
Demand TruthWhat do customers repeatedly ask for?ID Respond conversation history + vector searchdestination, date, budget, pax, concern, missing SKU
Conversion TruthWhich inquiries become orders?contact_order_link filtered to ID high confidencelead-to-order rate by product family
BenchmarkAre we competitive vs market?marketbear industry stats + competitor memoryprice/day gap, inclusion gap, route gap
SeasonalityWhen should product be pushed?booking_date + departure_date + Respond requested monthlow/high season alert and launch timing

📋 Recommendation Template

Product FamilyEvidence RequiredActionOwner
Hot productStrong sales + strong Respond demand + acceptable benchmarkScale dates and ad budgetProduct + Marketing
Fix productHigh inquiries but weak conversion or repeated objectionsChange SKU, inclusion, hotel, route, price ladder, or sales scriptProduct + Sales
Missing productRepeated demand with no mapped tour_codeCreate product brief and test campaignProduct
Upgrade productCustomers ask for better hotel, private, halal, family, or lower intensityCreate premium/comfort/private versionProduct + OPS
Budget recommendation connects ad spend, Respond quality, and Skybear ID orders.

📣 Marketing Monitor Data Flow

One row should become one mapped product, not one raw ad name.
InputAllowed SourceJoin KeyMetric
Lark ad sheetID ad spend/leads onlyproduct_tag / campaign / datedaily spend, leads, planned budget
Meta / Google adslead_funnel_meta_spend region=id; ad_roi_business_view account=2245831515date + account + campaignCPL, CTR, platform leads, ROI
Respond qualityrespondio_contact_attribution_fact region=idcontact_id + campaign/ad infoqualified leads, concern tags, source confidence
Skybear salesorder_sales_view legal_entity=wbt_idtour_code / customer identity / order linkorders, revenue IDR, conversion
Product competitivenessID Product Map + Product Intelligence outputmapped product familyscale / optimize / test / cut

🧮 Budget Decision Matrix

DecisionSignal CombinationRecommended ActionWatch-out
Scale UpLow/healthy CPL + strong qualified leads + orders + good benchmarkIncrease budget, add departure dates, refresh creativesCheck seat/visa/ticketing capacity first
OptimizeMany leads but low conversion or repeated concernFix product page, offer tier, creative promise, sales scriptDo not cut before product issue is diagnosed
Test MoreMarket hot + customer asks + small ad sampleSmall test budget with clear hypothesisNeeds product owner review
Cut BudgetHigh spend + weak qualified leads + weak orders + poor benchmarkReduce or pause campaignSeparate bad creative from bad product

💬 Welcome message

Build the group in WhatsApp app:
  1. Tap Open WhatsApp with customer below
  2. In WhatsApp, create a new group (use copied name above)
  3. Add sales + CS using their copied numbers
  4. Paste/send the welcome message
  5. From group info → copy invite link → paste below + Save
